REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, REAL PARTY IN INTEREST VENTURES TRUST'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO (1) ADD VENTURE TRUST AS A NAMED DEFENDANT; (2) TO ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING THAT PLAINTIFF HAS STANDING, I.E. PREJUDICE; (3) AS TO THE QUIET TITLE CAUSE OF ACTION TO ALLEGE ADVERSE CLAIMS; (4) AS TO THE CANCELLATION OF INSTRUMENT CAUSE OF ACTION TO ALLEGE INJURY; AND (5) AS TO THE DECLARATORY RELIEF CAUSE OF ACTION TO ALLEGE A JUSTICIABLE CONTROVERSY. FINALLY, PLAINTIFF MUST RETAIN COUNSEL TO REPRESENT THE TRUST OR ALLEGE FACTS RE: ZIEGLER V. NICKEL (1998) 64 CAL.APP.4TH 545. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion Re: Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs Complaint For Plaintiffs Failure To Amend After Order Sustaining Demurrer With Leave To Amend
Off Calendar Apr-04-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2016 Continued To May-04-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2016 Continued To Mar-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint For Failure To File Amended Complaint Following Order Granting Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings With Leave To Amend
Off Calendar Nov-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT COUNTRYWIDE BANK's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint For Failure To File Amended Complaint Following Order Granting Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings With Leave To Amend is Granted. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2015 Continued To Jan-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Real Party in Interest Ventures Trust's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) add Venture Trust as a named Defendant; (2) to allege facts showing that Plaintiff has standing, i.e. prejudice; (3) as to the quiet title cause of action to allege adverse claims; (4) as to the cancellation of instrument cause of action to allege injury; and (5) as to the declaratory relief cause of action to allege a justiciable controversy. Finally, Plaintiff must retain counsel to represent the Trust or allege facts re: Ziegler v. Nickel (1998) 64 Cal.App.4th 545. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Sep-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendant Bank of America's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) to allege facts showing that Plaintiff has standing, i.e. prejudice; (2) as to the quiet title cause of action to allege adverse claims; (3) as to the cancellation of instrument cause of action to allege injury; and (4) as to the declaratory relief cause of action to allege a justiciable controversy. Finally, Plaintiff must retain counsel to represent the Trust or allege facts re: Ziegler v. Nickel (1998) 64 Cal.App.4th 545. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A, Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Continued to September 11, 2015 to be heard with other pending motion. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
